topbar.searchPlaceholder: Search projects, decisions, tasks or knowledge
topbar.searchComingSoon: Search is coming soon — for now, browse from the sidebar.

inboxPage.title: Routing inbox
inboxPage.subtitle: The inbox isn't a message pile — it's the queue of signals the system thinks need a human: who is asking, why, what they will see, and whether sign-off is required.
inboxPage.routedEmpty: Nothing routed to you right now.
inboxPage.gatedEmpty: No gated proposals waiting on you.

brand.name: WorkGraph
brand.tagline: Coordination as a graph, not a document.

errors.network: Network error — check the API is running
errors.demoNoProject: Demo started but no project id returned

landing.subtitle: Turn a single message into a coordinated team plan. Every stage is a node, every handoff is an edge, and every decision is on the record.

whatYouType.title: What you type
whatYouType.body: One message. Say what you want, no form required.

whatWeDo.title: What we do
whatWeDo.body: Specialist agents parse, clarify, plan, and hand off — orchestrated as a graph, not a doc.

whatYouGet.title: What you get
whatYouGet.body: A live plan with owners, a conflict log with decisions, and a delivery summary when it ships.

demo.caption: Chat changes the graph. The graph changes the plan.
demo.captionZoomed: Every plan is a node in the org graph.

projects.subtitle: Natural-language intake or pick an existing project. Execution, audit, knowledge and organization live in the sidebar.
projects.heading: Projects
projects.empty: No projects yet. Post the first intake message above to kick one off.
projects.listSubtitle: ranked by activity, with the cheapest health chips per row

hero.subtitle: Compress conversations, decisions, tasks and knowledge into one work graph. The home doesn't just list things — it tells you which signals need attention, which decisions are about to crystallize, and where projects are drifting.
hero.pulseHeadline: {count, plural, =0 {Nothing waiting} one {# item awaiting action} other {# items awaiting action}}
hero.pulseBodyActive: Pending signals are routed to you because the system thinks you're best positioned to act.
hero.pulseBodyQuiet: All routed signals are answered. Use the bench to review projects, decisions and knowledge changes.

miniGraph.title: Work graph
miniGraph.empty: No graph snapshot yet — start a project to see its shape.

approvals.title: Gated approvals
approvals.empty: No gated approvals waiting on you

active.title: You're working on
active.llmOffer: Refresh status or rehearse your next step…
active.caughtUpNoHistory: No crystallizations yet — kick one off from a project stream.
active.noActiveTask: No active task — pick a project to start one.

projects.title: Your projects
projects.empty: You're not a member of any project yet. Start one below.

newProject.title: New project
newProject.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what you're building — the edge LLM will parse this as the first requirement.
newProject.invitePlaceholder: Comma-separated usernames, e.g. raj, aiko, diego
newProject.uploadHint: Pick documents to upload as personal KB notes — only you'll see them until you promote.

recap.title: What this room should be thinking about

suggestion.ask_or_decide: Make the next message explicit: are you asking for a fact, or asking for a decision?
suggestion.follow_up_risk: The top open risk is the load-bearing one — surface it directly before drifting to side topics.
suggestion.ratify_decision: Recent decisions are not yet ratified by the room — confirm them or reopen the discussion.

contextPanel.hint: Choose which sources Edge can read in this stream
contextPanel.title: What can the agent read here?
contextPanel.subtitle: Toggle which sources Edge consults when it answers in this stream. Defaults err on the side of trust without leaking private context across the room.

dms.label: Direct messages
dms.hint: Off by default to avoid permission contamination

audit.label: Audit log
audit.hint: Verbose — opt in only when explaining causation

personal.label: Personal
personal.hint: Only your notes and personal stream

group.label: Cell
group.hint: Content shared inside this project cell

stream.empty: No messages yet — kick things off below.

plusMenu.adjustContextHint: Use the scope pills in the project bar at the top.

wikiEntry.label: Save to project wiki
wikiEntry.willUseSourceMessage: Will save the source message body as the entry.

rooms.emptyTimeline: No messages yet — start the conversation.
rooms.suggestionFromHint: From the message above. Accept or dismiss in the Reviews panel.

newRoom.title: Create a room
newRoom.subtitle: Sub-team, topical, or ad-hoc
newRoom.youAlwaysIncluded: You're always added as the room creator.
newRoom.genericError: Could not create room. Try again.

workbench.title: Workbench
workbench.subtitle: Same entity, multiple projections
workbench.comingSoon: Coming in N.4 — vocabulary established now.
workbench.comingSoonBody: This panel kind is part of the projection vocabulary; its renderer ships next slice.
workbench.knowledgeEmpty: No knowledge items yet — promote a message to start.
workbench.knowledgeSearchEmpty: No knowledge items match this search.
workbench.tasksEmpty: No personal tasks yet — add one to start drafting.
workbench.crystallizeHint: Propose this message as a decision candidate (subjective override of the auto-classifier).
workbench.tasksScopeTeamComingSoon: Team-scope plan tasks land in a follow-up slice.
workbench.skillsEmpty: No project members yet — invite teammates to populate the skill atlas.

org.title: Organization
org.subtitle: Where authority concentrates, where single-point risks live, and how load is distributed. Different intent from Status (project health) and Skills (capability map) — this page is about who decides what.

status.title: Project status
status.subtitle: Critical path, risks, decisions, external artifacts and what's next.

tasks.title: Active tasks
tasks.newTaskHint: Personal task — only you see it until promoted

decisions.title: Recent decisions
decisions.applyOutcomeHint: Did the decision's mechanical follow-through complete?

artifacts.title: External artifacts
artifacts.empty: No git commits or docs linked yet

membraneNotes.title: Membrane notes
membraneNotes.empty: Membrane has nothing waiting on humans.

postmortem.heading: 📝 Postmortem
postmortem.description: Generate a project-wide postmortem from graph state.

handoff.heading: 🤝 Handoff docs
handoff.description: Generate a role-summary handoff document for a teammate from graph history.
handoff.empty: No other teammates in this project yet.

kb.subtitle: Personal notes and shared items live in one tree. Badges show source.
kb.title: Knowledge base
kb.notAvailable: Knowledge base will be available soon.
kb.sharedSubtitle: Team-scope KB items — promoted from personal notes, ingested from wiki/git/RSS, or saved from stream messages. Everyone in the project sees these.

folder.newItemHelp: Opens project settings → External signal subscriptions. KB entries are created by the ingest pipeline, not by hand.
folder.newNoteHelp: Write a personal-scope KB note in the selected folder. Only you see it; promote later to share with the team.
folder.cycleRejected: Moving there would create a cycle.
folder.nameConflict: A folder with that name already exists here.
folder.notEmpty: Folder isn't empty — move its contents first.

license.label: Per-item license override
license.help: Overrides the project default for this item only.

personal.title: My thread
personal.subtitle: You + your edge agent, scoped to this project
personal.empty: Ask your edge agent anything — it knows this project's graph, recent decisions, and who to route to.

routeProposal.bFacingPlaceholder: Write the question as if you're asking {name} directly…
routeProposal.noTargets: (no targets surfaced — type a follow-up to redirect)

preAnswer.subheader: Based on their skills — not an actual reply from {name}
preAnswer.humanDemandHint: {name}'s sub-agent can't pre-know this — looks like a question that needs their real-time judgment (allocation / scheduling / capacity).
preAnswer.failed: Pre-answer failed. You can still route.

gatedProposal.openToVoteHint: Skip the single-approver flow — let the authority pool vote on this together.

inbound.framingNote: (written by {name}'s sub-agent — phrasing is in their voice, not yours)
inbound.customPlaceholder: Or reply in your own words…

reply.counterPlaceholder: What extra info / framing do they need?

project.audit_subtitle: Graph, plan, tasks, risks and decisions belong to the same audit domain — internal tabs keep them together.

commit.title: Commit a promise
commit.subtitle: A thesis-commit binds the project to a future state. Drift detection measures reality against what was promised.
commit.headlinePlaceholder: e.g. Ship Stellar Drift by Apr 30
commit.slaHint: Nudge the owner when this window remains before the target.
commit.metricPlaceholder: e.g. all 10 tasks shipped, no critical risks open

licenseBanner.taskScoped: Restricted view — you see only your assigned work. Contact the project owner for broader access.

sim.banner: Simulating: drop "{headline}" — {orphans} orphan tasks · {exposed} exposed deliverables · {slipping} slipping milestones · {atRisk} at-risk commitments

graph.empty: graph is empty — intake has not completed yet

org.noPeers: No peer projects yet — you're only in this one.

nodeDetail.unavailable: node unavailable — not a project member or fetch failed

inbox.doubleClickHint: Click for drawer · double-click for full inbox

gateKeeperMap.heading: Sign-off gate-keepers
gateKeeperMap.help: Decisions of these classes route to the named teammate for sign-off before they crystallize. Leave unassigned to skip gating for that class.
gateKeeperMap.noGateKeeper: No gate-keeper set; decisions of this class crystallize without sign-off.

membrane.routedAs: Edge routed this to you as {tag}
membrane.ingestSuccess: Proposed signal — review in the membrane panel.
membrane.subscriptionsHelp: Active-membrane feeds and standing search queries the cron polls. Every hit still needs human confirmation before it routes.

index.title: Rendered docs
index.subtitle: The renders surface only keeps graph-derived documents — postmortems, handoffs, external reports. Plans, tasks and risks live in the audit view.

handoff.title: Handoff docs
handoff.subtitle: by member
handoff.empty: No teammates yet — invite someone to enable handoff renders.

render.loadFailed: Couldn't load this render. Try regenerating or check you're a project member.
render.editNote: Edits are local only in v1 — they won't persist across reloads.
render.manualReview: This render hit a manual-review fallback. Expect gaps.

postmortem.title: Postmortem
postmortem.noData: No postmortem available yet — kick off a decision to populate lineage.

sections.myStyle: Style notes (how I reply to common asks)

prose_polish.label: Prose polish
prose_polish.prompt: Looks like a stylistic tweak — save it as a prose override without touching the graph?

semantic_reversal.label: Reverses a decision
semantic_reversal.prompt: This edit reads like it reverses an existing crystallized decision. Crystallize a new superseding decision, or discard the edit so the graph stays truthful?

new_content.label: New content
new_content.prompt: Looks like a new thesis, risk note, or design note — record it as a first-class graph entity, or keep it as free prose on this render?

structural_change.label: Structural change
structural_change.prompt: This edit changes a deadline, assignment, or dependency. Cascade to downstream tasks, or apply to this line only?

dm.title: Direct message
dm.notFound: Stream not found or you don't have access.

backend.heading: Preview only
backend.body: DM delivery is stubbed in v1 — messages render locally but aren't persisted. Backend endpoints /api/streams/'{id}'/messages and /ws/streams/'{id}' are not wired yet.

skillAtlas.title: Skill atlas
skillAtlas.subtitle: Two skills lock to every member: the role skill (imposed by the role, stays with the role) and the profile skill (declared by the person, validated by what the graph actually saw). Together they are the group's capital, beside the knowledge base.
skillAtlas.unavailable: Skill atlas is unavailable. You may not be a member of this project.
skillAtlas.restrictedBanner: Restricted view — members see only their own card. The collective aggregate and other members' cards are visible to project owners only.

collective.title: Group aggregate
collective.noGaps: None — every declared ability has been observed

teamShape.title: Team shape
teamShape.subtitle: How this {member_count}-person team has behaved over the last 30 days.
teamShape.concentrationHint: share from the single most active decider

card.roleSkillsSubtitle: Imposed by role · transfers to successor on handoff
card.declaredSubtitle: Stated at onboarding · green = validated by observed work
card.observedSubtitle: Earned from emissions in the last 30 days
card.noRoleSkills: No role skills derived for this role yet.
card.noObserved: No observed skills in the last 30 days.

inherited.subtitle: Your sub-agent reads these skill-keyed routines when routing questions to you. PII-stripped — no names or message bodies. {count} predecessor(s) transferred working patterns into your account.

handoff.dialogSubtitle: Transfer role-skill inheritance + PII-stripped working routines to a successor. Role skills follow the role; the routine layer is what the successor's sub-agent will consult in future routings.
handoff.prepareFailed: Could not draft. Only project owners may prepare handoffs.
handoff.noRoutines: No recent emissions matched the 90-day window. Successor inherits role skills only.

teamPerf.title: Team performance
teamPerf.subtitle: Observable performance management — per-member counts drawn from the project graph on every load. Project admins only.
teamPerf.forbidden: You need project-admin access to see this panel.
teamPerf.unavailable: Performance data unavailable. You may not be a member of this project.

running.body: {source}'s and {target}'s sub-agents are debating before we interrupt a human…

silentConsensus.bodyPrefix: These members have been acting in agreement:

onboarding.subtitle: Your 10-minute ambient tour of this project's graph slice.
onboarding.restrictedNotice: Restricted view — scoped to your license tier ({tier}).
onboarding.replayBody: Re-open the Day 1 walkthrough on this project's next visit.
onboarding.emptySection: No content in this section yet.

meeting.title: Meetings
meeting.subtitle: Upload a transcript — decisions, action items, and risks become proposals you accept.
meeting.listEmpty: No transcripts yet. Paste one above.
meeting.uploadTooShort: Transcript is too short — paste at least a few lines.
meeting.forbidden: You don't have access to this project's meetings.
meeting.signalsPending: Metabolizing transcript… refresh in a moment.
meeting.signalsFailed: Metabolism failed. An owner can re-run it from the detail page.
meeting.signalsEmpty: No signals extracted. The transcript may not contain decisions, tasks, or risks.

composition.title: Org Composition
composition.noMembers: This project has no members yet.
composition.sectionA_subtitle: Who gates, who votes, and where the single points of failure are.
composition.sectionB_subtitle: Sorted by authority load. Higher = more gates + voter pools + in-flight work.
composition.sectionC_subtitle: Pairs of members who co-hold authority on one or more classes.
composition.sectionC_empty: No shared-authority pairs yet — add a gate-keeper or a second owner to start building the network.

invite.heading: Members
invite.subtitle: Who's on this project. Owners can invite by username.
invite.errorChars: Username can only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and dashes.
invite.errorAlreadyMember: That user is already on this project.
invite.errorNotFound: No account found with username @{username} — ask them to register first.

skillDeclarationBanner.label: Welcome
skillDeclarationBanner.heading: You're now in {project} — before you start, add 2–3 skills so the group knows where you fit.

kbNotes.title: Personal KB notes
kbNotes.scopeExplainer: These are personal-scope KB items — only you see them. Promote any to share with the team; promoted items appear in the shared knowledge tree below.
kbNotes.empty: No notes yet. Click "+ New note" to write one. Personal notes only you see; promote to share with the team.
kbNotes.scopePersonalHint: only you see this; LLM uses for your sub-agent only
kbNotes.scopeGroupHint: everyone in the project sees this; affects the team's pretext
kbNotes.promoteConfirm: Make this note visible to the whole team? It will affect everyone's pretext.
kbNotes.promoteDeferred: Sent for review — owner will accept it from the team room.
kbNotes.deleteConfirm: Delete this note? This cannot be undone.
kbNotes.uploadTooLarge: File is too large (5 MB max).

forbidden.title: You don't have access to this workspace
forbidden.body: Ask the workspace owner to invite you.

invite.title: Invite a member
invite.userNotFound: No account found with username @{name} — ask them to register first.
invite.forbidden: Only workspace owners and admins can invite.
invite.invalidUsername: Username must be 3–32 characters, letters/digits/dashes only.

shellVNext.newGroupTip: Create a new group inside the current project.
shellVNext.newGroupNoProjectTip: Switch to a project agent first to create a group inside it.

flowPill.infoTip: No project context — switch to a project agent to browse its knowledge.
flowPill.memoryTip: No project context — switch to a project agent to see its memory.
flowPill.memoryTipProject: Open this project's performance / memory page.
flowPill.skillsTip: No project context — switch to a project agent for the skill atlas.

suggestion.label: Looks like "{project}" — open in that project's agent?

shellVNext.timelineEmpty: No messages yet. Say something below.
shellVNext.composerPlaceholder: Send a message to your agent…

plus.hint: Inert in v1 — backend wiring per spec §11.

projectBar.noProject: No project context — talking to your global agent.
projectBar.cellTip: Toggle to broaden context to this project's cell scope. Default off per Q-B.

tasks.noProject: Pick a project agent to see this project's tasks.
tasks.emptyMine: No personal drafts yet. Add one above.

knowledge.noProject: Pick a project agent to see this project's knowledge.

skills.noProject: Pick a project agent to see its members + skill tags.

workflow.hint: Stages render live from the graph in production — this is a placeholder shape.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Cells you belong to. Click one to drop into its agent.
projects.summaryBody: {count, plural, =0 {No projects yet — start one above.} =1 {You're in 1 project.} other {You're in # projects.}}
projects.empty: Nothing to show — create a project to begin.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.subtitle: Personal drafts and the canonical group plan.
tasks.planEmpty: No plan tasks yet for this project.

org.title: Organization
org.subtitle: Members + skill tags from your active project.
org.summaryBody: {count, plural, =0 {No members yet.} =1 {1 member.} other {# members.}}

audit.title: Audit
audit.subtitle: High-impact actions and graph writes.
audit.pendingBody: The audit-feed endpoint isn't wired yet — this slice ships when the audit-stream slice lands.

graph.title: Project graph
graph.subtitle: The graph IS the project — every task, decision, risk, and dependency as a node.
graph.noProjectBody: Pick a project agent or room from the left, or create a new project, to see its graph.
